checks.name: ceiling_comment
checks.description: CommentOnDocument only if owner or in commentACL (authenticated)

checks.name: ceiling_view

checks.name: floor_comment_acl
checks.description: Users in commentACL MUST be able to CommentOnDocument

results.description: CommentOnDocument only if owner or in commentACL (authenticated)
results.counterexample:

  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Action::"CommentOnDocument",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  DocumentShare::"C",
  DocumentShare::"",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Document::"" {
    commentACL: DocumentShare::"",
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"B",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"C",
  },
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
]
